notes: Moran is Moriarty's most trusted lieutenant and the network's chief enforcer. Holmes's dossier on Moran describes him as the second most dangerous man in London — the first being Moriarty. After Moriarty's death at Reichenbach, Moran continues operating independently, motivated partly by personal vendetta against Holmes. The relationship is the defining villain-cluster edge in the canon: Moriarty supplies the intellect, Moran the lethal capability.
